message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as U1
participant "Expendedora" as E
participant "Orden" as O
participant "Lata" as L
participant "Bebida" as B

U1 ..> E : aceptarCosepel()
E ..> U1 : aceptarCosepel()

E ..> O : nuevaOrden()
O ..> L : solicitarLata()
L ..> E : actualizarStock()

U1 ..> E : procesarOrden()
E ..> U1 : vuelto()

@enduml
